title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Questions on global priorities and the future of the human race.

questions.question: Is it right to spend billions on space when there is still poverty on Earth?
Do you think humans will eventually live on other planets?
If you had the chance to go on a one-way trip to Mars, would you take it?

script.text: Is it right to spend billions on space when there is still poverty on Earth?
Do you think humans will eventually live on other planets?
If you had the chance to go on a one-way trip to Mars, would you take it?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
